calendar.matters:
Petition To Fill Vacancy In Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Leon Ainer for Karen White (Petitioner).

The Court questions why Mr. Ainer didn't file this petition in the 2010 case. Mr. Ainer stated that he didn't do that because in the 2010 case the second Trustee was petitioning to remove the initial Trustee. The Court stated that there is one trust and there should be one case number. The Court on its own motion consolidates this case PTR-19-302972 with the existing case PTR-10-293214 for all purposes. Case number PTR-10-293214 is the lead case. No further filings are to be made in case number PTR-19-302972. All future filings are to be made in case number PTR-10-293214. Mr. Ainer is to provide a form of order. The Court granted the Petition to Fill Vacancy in Trustee (subject to review of the order). Mr. Ainer clarified that the trust is not under Court supervision.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Fill Vacancy In Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
